recommendations.title: Sensitive API key is echoed back in setup summary
recommendations.description: The CLI prints the full API key in a suggested export command. This unnecessarily exposes credentials in terminal output and raises accidental leakage risk.

recommendations.title: Missing unit tests for multiple exported core modules
recommendations.description: verify(), installMcp()/uninstallMcp(), installCommands()/uninstallCommands(), and installAgents()/uninstallAgents() have no corresponding test modules, leaving core install/verify behavior insufficiently covered.

recommendations.title: Large multi-responsibility CLI orchestration function
recommendations.description: runSetup() is substantially over the 50-line guideline and combines auth, install, health-check, shell, manifest, and summary responsibilities.

recommendations.title: Public documentation is inconsistent with implementation
recommendations.description: README claims 22 agents and includes /agents:workflow-synthesis, while the CLI's AGENT_LIST contains only 21 entries and omits that command.

recommendations.title: Missing API documentation on exported functions/interfaces
recommendations.description: Several exported interfaces and functions are missing JSDoc or equivalent API documentation.

recommendations.title: Edge-case coverage incomplete for networked verification paths
recommendations.description: Network-validation branches and verification failure paths are implemented but not covered by tests.

recommendations.title: Business flow remains concentrated in CLI layer
recommendations.description: The CLI entrypoint mixes presentation with orchestration and persistence concerns instead of delegating more workflow logic to dedicated modules.

recommendations.title: Test execution was not evidenced from repository inspection
recommendations.description: A test command exists, but no execution evidence was available in the inspected artifacts, so passing status could not be confirmed.

recommendations.title: Dependency justification not documented
recommendations.description: Runtime dependency choices are reasonable but undocumented.
